0: As someone who has traveled a difficult path of
their own, I have a request for you. Other messiahs
in other universes travel their own difficult paths,
just like you. I would like you to serve as a
guiding light to them. I'll tell you more once
you've accepted this quest.
[END]
1: ダミー
[END]
2: ダウンロードクエスト追記
[END]
